name: Earthborn

abilities.name: Earth Form
Earthen Body
abilities.effect:
Gain the following:
* Replace [_Natural_] with [_Earth_] on all your effects.
* Increase your _Resistance_ to _Fire_ and _Cold_ by 1 step.
* Increase your _Resistance_ to _Lightning_ by 2 steps.

desc: You're a spirit of earth, as indomitable and unbreakable as a mountain.

name: Flameborn
desc: You are a spirit formed from flame, flickering and always hungry.

abilities.name: Flame Form
Flame Body
abilities.effect:
Gain the following:
* Replace [_Natural_] with [_Flame_] on all your effects. Additionally, they inflict _Alight_ 1 on a _Crit_ and add [_Fire_].
* Increase your _Resistance_ to _Natural_ by 1 step.
* Increase your _Resistance_ to _Fire_ and _Cold_ by 2 steps.
* Increase your _Weakness_ to _Water_ by 2 steps.
* You cannot gain _Alight_; when you would (after applying _Resistance_), gain an equivalent amount of _Stamina_ or _Guard_ in any combination.
* You cannot gain _Soaked_; when you would, instead take 5 Damage and become _Impaired_ and _Dazed_.
* If you would become _Swimming_, immediately lose all _Stamina_.

abilities.name: Burning Aura
abilities.effect: Whenever you are targeted by a _Melee_ Attack, the Attacker takes 2 _Fire_ _Damage_.

abilities.name: Flare
abilities.effect: For the remainder of the _Turn_, _Ignite_ any _Position_ you _Occupy_.

name: Metalborn

abilities.name: Metal Form
Metallic Body
abilities.effect:
Your metallic form grants you the following benefits:
* Replace [_Natural_] with [_Metal_] on all your effects.
* Increase your _Resistance_ to _Stab_, _Crush_, and _Slash_ by 1 step.

desc: You're a spirit of metal, cold and unyielding.

name: Windborn

abilities.name: Wind Form
Wind Body
abilities.effect:
Your wind form grants you the following benefits:
* Replace [_Natural_] with [_Wind_] on all your effects.
* You never suffer ill effects from _Falling_.
* Increase your _Resistance_ to _Crush_ and _Natural_ by 1 step.
* Increase your _Resistance_ to _Lightning_ by 2 steps.

When determining _Sources_ for _Manifesting_, treat _Wind_ _Terrain_ as a _Major Source_, any open air as a _Moderate Source_, and underground as a _Minor Source_.

desc: You're a spirit of wind, ethereal and free.

name: Woodborn

abilities.name: Wooden Form
Wooden Body
abilities.effect:
Your wooden form grants you the following effects:
* Replace [_Natural_] with [_Wood_] on all your effects.
* Increase your Resistance to _Crush_ and _Stab_ by 1 step.
* Increase your Weakness to _Fire_ by 1 step.

desc: You're a spirit of wood, adaptable and ever-growing.

name: Lightly Armored
prereqs: Metal, Earth, Wood, or Ice Spirit, and no other [Armored] Traits.

abilities.name: Light Armor
abilities.effect: This spirit gains the _Light Natural Armor_.

desc: You have scales, a thin shell, or some other natural defense mechanism that provides some limited protection.

name: Moderately Armored
prereqs: Metal, Earth, Wood, or Ice Spirit, and no other [Armored] Traits.

abilities.name: Medium Armor
abilities.effect: This spirit gains the _Medium Natural Armor_.

desc: You have a shell, thick elemental plating, or some other natural defense mechanism that provides some protection.

name: Sure-Footed

abilities.name: Perfect Footing
Confident Mobility
abilities.effect: Once per _Round_ you may ignore any increased _Movement_ cost or penalties to _Reflex_ due to _Terrain_ at no cost. You may refresh this ability for 1 _Momentum_ at any point. Finally, gain +1 _Reflex_.

desc: You have an impeccable sense of balance, allowing you to move safely and confidently through anything.

name: Harrier

abilities.name: Harrying Combatant
abilities.effect: Your are nimble and fast, with a fighting style that allows you to slip in and out of foes' reach in a flash as you distract and confuse. Once per Skill Challenge, when your ability to distract and harry foes would be of assistance gain an automatic _Advantage_ stake when your horns would aid in battle.

abilities.name: Distract
abilities.desc: You charge a foe, obstructing their vision and distracting them, drawing their attention for a moment before you slip away.
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range. The Target may not Attack you this _Turn_. After making this Attack you may leave your current _Engagement_, ignoring your Stance's limitations and paying _Movement_ costs as normal.

enhancements.name: Draw Ire
enhancements.effect: On a _Hit_+, add _Impaired_ [_Focus_] as you force your opponent to momentarily think about attacking you. You must select this Enhancement prior to making the Attack Roll.

enhancements.name: Draw Gaze
enhancements.effect: On a _Hit_+, add _Dazed_ [_Focus_] as you manipulate your foe into a less advantageous position. You must select this Enhancement prior to making the Attack Roll.

abilities.name: Harrying Assault
abilities.effect:
You may either:
* If the original Attack was not <u>Distract</u>, use <u>Distract</u> on the Target of the original Attack at no Cost. You automatically _Hit_.
* Use <u>Distract</u> on the closest enemy you haven't attacked this _Turn_ at no Cost.  You automatically _Hit_. You may leave your _Engagement_ to do this and must pay all _Movement_ costs as normal, but Attacks against you this _Turn_ have _Disadvantage_.

desc: You excel at distracting and confusing foes, darting in and out of their reach without a worry.

name: Flowering

abilities.name: Natural Bloom
Fruiting
abilities.effect: While traveling, you may take 1 _Stress_ to create 2 _Food_ (Standard) or 1 _Food_ (Good) as some of your flowers bloom into small fruit.

abilities.name: Fertile Bloom
abilities.effect: Your _Engagement_ is treated as _Fertile_ for the rest of the _Round_.

abilities.name: Sprouting
abilities.effect: While in _Fertile_ Terrain, gain +1 _Stamina_ and +2 _Guard_ when _Regrowth_ triggers. You may be treated as a _Least_ or _Minor Source_ (_Wood_) as you spontaneously sprout branches and other growths that can be removed without harming you.

desc: You're covered in small, flowering growths that can be encouraged to grow at a moment's notice.

name: Metallic Threads

abilities.name: Threads
Subtle Web
abilities.effect: During the _Camp Phase_, you may lay down a web of fine metal wires to help secure the camp. This will make it incredibly easy to track your camp, but automatically counts as somebody taking the _Secure_ _Camp Action_.

abilities.name: Wire Whip
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within _Range_. You may deal no Damage to reduce the cost of <u>Entangle</u> by 1, but must choose prior to making the Attack.

enhancements.name: Entangle
enhancements.effect: Add _Entangled_ 1 [_Reflex_] on a _Graze_+, or _Entangled_ 2 [_Reflex_] on a _Crit_.

abilities.name: Web Trap
abilities.effect: Create a _Metallic Web_ in _Range_ 0, which is treated as a _Minor Source_ (_Metal_). When a creature becomes _Engaged_ with _Metallic Web_ they must _Negate_ [_Reflex_ 7] or gain _Entangled_ 1; this is also inflicted if the _Metallic Web_ is used as a _Missile_. You are immune to all _Metallic Webs_ you create. You may use this once on your _Turn_ regardless of _Stance_ after completing all the Stance's actions.

desc: You can emit thin metallic threads, allowing you to move similar to a spider.

name: Locust Biology

abilities.name: Locust Biology
abilities.effect: You have _Resistance_ [_Poison_].

desc: Locusts are near-impervious to poison due to their heavy reliance on it.

name: Strong Jaws

abilities.name: Crushing Jaws
abilities.effect: Your powerful jaws are mighty weapons, allowing you to grasp onto a foe and control them. Once per Skill Challenge gain an automatic _Vexation_ stake when your jaws would aid in battle.

abilities.name: Jaws
abilities.desc: A natural weapon suitable for mighty jaws and other things that rip and tear.
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range. If you already have the _Target_ _Grabbed_ with this, make your Attack with _Advantage_. After inflicting _Grabbed_, whenever a target attempts to escape they take 2 Damage.

enhancements.name: Thrash
enhancements.effect: You thrash about as you grab the target, throwing them off-balance. Add _Impaired_.

enhancements.name: Ripping Crush
enhancements.effect: You may only choose this _Enhancement_ if you already had the Target _Grabbed_ with this Attack prior to the Attack. Add _Bleeding_ 1 to the Attack.

enhancements.name: Drag
enhancements.effect: If you _Grappled_ with this Attack, you may immediately leave your current _Engagement_, paying all _Movement_ costs as normal.

desc: You have powerful jaws that foes have a hard time escaping from.

name: Piercing Horns

abilities.name: Horned Wrath
abilities.effect: Your powerful horns or antlers are mighty weapons, especially when you have room to maneuver. Once per Skill Challenge, if you have room to maneuver, gain an automatic _Efficacy_ stake when your horns would aid in battle.

abilities.name: Horns
abilities.desc: A natural weapon suitable for sharp horns, antlers, and similar growths.
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range. If you became _Engaged_ with the Target this _Turn_, deal +1 Damage, even on a _Miss_.

enhancements.name: Driving Ram
enhancements.effect: Add _Push_. If you successfully _Push_ you may _Move_ with the Target, paying only increased costs due to _Terrain_ and _Status_. Do not create any _Openings_ if you do so.

enhancements.name: Head Down
enhancements.effect: You put your head down and charge with reckless abandon. Deal +_1/2/2/3_ Damage Damage. If you Miss, gain 4 _Guard_ and _Exposed_. If you _Graze_, instead gain 2 _Guard_. You must choose this _Enhancement_ prior to making the Attack.

desc: You have sharp horns that can pierce deep into foes.

name: Sharp Claws

abilities.name: Rending Claws
abilities.effect: Your claws are incredibly deadly and are an incredibly lethal opening assault. On the very first round of a _Skill Challenge_, gain an automatic _Efficacy_ stake when your claws would aid in battle.

abilities.name: Claw
abilities.desc: A natural weapon suitable for claws, talons, and all similar appendages.
abilities.effect: Make two Attacks. You may _Move_ between these Attacks. If you _Hit_+ the same Target twice in a _Turn_ add _Bleeding_ 1.

enhancements.name: Furious Assault
enhancements.effect: You may _Move_ and Attack again at a -1 _Penalty_. You may repeat this _Enhancement_, but take an additional -1 _Penalty_ each time.

enhancements.name: Rend
enhancements.effect: You may purchase this _Enhancement_ after a _Hit_+ on a Target. Add [_Pierce_ 1] to all subsequent <u>Claw</u> Attacks against the Target this _Turn_ and a +1 _Bonus_ to the next Attack against the Target. You may purchase this _Enhancement_ any number of times in a _Turn_.

analysis_notes.notes: Attacking twice is good; fudge is for Gambit value inherent to an attack.

desc: You have sharp claws useful for attacking foes.

name: Heavy Stinger

abilities.name: Powerful Sting
abilities.effect: You have a heavy stinger that you can use to attack with from a distance. Once per skill challenge _Skill Challenge_, gain an automatic _Vexation_ stake when your stinger would aid in battle.

abilities.name: Sting
abilities.desc: A natural weapon suitable for powerful stingers and similar piercing attacks.
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range. When a creature in your _Arena_ creates an _Opening_, you may pay 1 _Momentum_ to treat yourself as _Engaged_ with the Target.

enhancements.name: Pin
enhancements.effect: Add _Slowed_ to the Attack. While the enemy is _Slowed_, you both may not leave your current _Arena_ and you may not use this Attack against any other Targets.

enhancements.name: Pierce
enhancements.effect: Add [_Pierce_ 3] and deal +_1/2/4/5_ Damage with the triggering Attack.

desc: You have a powerful piercing weapon like a scorpion's stinger that can punch through most defenses.

name: Climber

abilities.name: Natural Climber
Climbing
abilities.effect: You can bypass many features (such as _Cliffs_) when moving between _Arenas_.

desc: You're a natural climber, allowing you to easily scale even the most sheer of surfaces.

name: Keen Nose

abilities.name: Scent
Scent Trail
abilities.effect: When traveling, your companion may always play [ ] to track a target. Additionally, you may take 1 _Stress_ to allow them to play one [ ] as if it was _Menace_.

desc: You're a natural climber, allowing you to easily scale even the most sheer of surfaces.

name: Predator

abilities.name: Natural Predator
Skilled Hunter
abilities.effect: While you are manifested while traveling, your companion may spend a single [ ] as if it was _Efficacy_ to do the _Hunt_ _Travel Action_. This does not require that they choose _Hunt_ if they play _Efficacy_ through another means. Additionally, when your companion takes the _Hunt_ _Travel Action_ during the _Camp Phase_, you may assist them and grant them an additional die.

abilities.name: Scent of Blood
abilities.effect: You always know the creature within Range 1 with the least current Stamina. Whenever a _Stance_ would have you target the nearest creature, you may instead choose that creature.

abilities.name: Finisher
abilities.effect: When attacking creatures with half their _Stamina_ or less gain a +1 _Bonus_ to all Attacks. Additionally, the first Attack each _Round_ against such a creature gains [_Discount_ 1].

desc: You're a natural killer, and excel at hunting and eliminating other creatures.

name: Pack Animal

abilities.name: Pack Instinct
Good Listener
abilities.effect: Party members may include you in the <u>Vent</u> _Camp Action_ as if you were a character; if they do, you clear _Stress_ as normal.

abilities.name: Flank
abilities.trigger: A creature you are _Engaged_ with is Attacked by a creature other than you.
abilities.effect: The Attack gains a +1 _Bonus_ if _Melee_. Additionally, the Target has _Disadvantage_ on any _Defense Roll_ made against this Attack.

desc: You're a pack or herd animal, and fit naturally into the social hierarchy of an adventuring group.

name: Cute

abilities.name: Cuteness
Big Eyes
abilities.effect: Once per _Journey_, when you are _Pampered_, you may clear a _Stress_ for any present party member.

abilities.name: Avenge the Mascot
abilities.effect: If you are _Defeated_, the next Attack against the creature that _Defeated_ you by an ally may use an additional _Gambit_.

desc: You're an adorable creature, and all those that see you find you irresistible.

name: Skulker
desc: You are a shadow, making no sound with your steps and betraying nothing.

abilities.name: Stealthy
Watchful Shadow
abilities.effect: While traveling, you may stick close to the party, scouting in the shadows. If you do this, the first time you reveal a card from the _Menace Deck_ (by removing the _Menace_ _Danger_) you may choose to exclude _Mishaps_ put there due to party members.

abilities.name: Low-Profile
abilities.effect: While you have _Cover_, you cannot be attacked by Attacks originating from outside your _Arena_. You lose this benefit until the next _Round_ if you Attack or force a creature to _Negate_.

abilities.name: Sneak
abilities.effect: For the rest of this _Turn_ enemies may not _Engage_ you, you do not provoke _Reactions_ and, after completing your _Movement_, you have _Soft Cover_ for the remainder of the round, or you Attack, force a creature to _Negate_, or become _Engaged_.

name: Sprinter
desc: When given an open field few can match your speed and acceleration.

abilities.name: Speedy
Improved Mobility
abilities.effect: Gain +1 _Movement_.

abilities.name: Sprint
abilities.triger: None. You may use this Reaction at any time, but only once per Round.
abilities.effect: Immediately gain 2 _Movement_ and 1 Fatigue.

name: Shepherding Instinct
desc: You have a natural instinct to shepherd and protect those close to you.

abilities.name: Protective Instinct
Watchful Shepherd
abilities.effect: Whenever an ally would suffer an effect they could avoid by being moved you may rescue them, taking the effect in their place.

abilities.name: Watchful Protector
abilities.effect: Whenever a Stance requires that you Target the nearest enemy, you may instead choose the nearest ally _Engaged_ with an enemy. You may always use <u>Shepherd</u>, even if it would cause you to fail your _Stance's_ objectives.

abilities.name: Shepherd
abilities.effect: An ally in the _Engagement_ may immediately leave it, spending no _Movement_ and creating no _Opening_.

name: Swift
desc: You're uncommonly fast and quick on your feet, able to change direction near-instantly and rapidly cover distances.

abilities.name: Swiftness
Dart
abilities.effect: Whenever there's a question of where you are in a situation you may choose, so long as you have the appropriate movement (swimming, climbing, etc.) to accomplish it.

abilities.name: Agility
abilities.effect: Gain +1 _Movement_ and +1 _Reflex_.

abilities.name: Scamper
abilities.effect: You may _Retreat_, regardless of what your _Stance_ dictates.

abilities.name: Tiny Size
Diminutive Agility
abilities.effect: Your Spirit becomes _Tiny_, decreases their _Speed_ by 1, gains a +1 to _Reflex_, and +1 _Movement_. If they already have _Speed_ 1, instead gain an additional +1 _Movement_. You may _Manifest_ your Spirit from a _Least Source_.

abilities.name: Small Size
Small Profile
abilities.effect: Your Spirit becomes _Small_, gains +2 _Stamina_, +1 _Guard_, and +1 _Reflex_. You may _Manifest_ your Spirit from a _Minor Source_.

abilities.name: Medium Size
Medium Profile
abilities.effect: Your Spirit becomes _Medium_, gains +5 _Stamina_, +3 _Guard_, and +1 _Grit_. You may _Manifest_ your Spirit from a _Moderate Source_.

abilities.name: Large Size
Large Profile
abilities.effect: Your Spirit becomes _Large_, gains +10 _Stamina_, +6 _Guard_, and +2 _Grit_. Additionally, its _Speed_ is increased by 1. You may _Manifest_ your Spirit from a _Major Source_.
